# Stack Scout

> Stack Scout tracks the tools, services, APIs, MCPs, CLIs, and workbench apps worth a builder's attention.

## Start Here

- [Home](https://koltregaskes.github.io/stackscout/index.html): Editorial front door, featured tools, categories, updates, and the lab subset.
- [Top tools](https://koltregaskes.github.io/stackscout/catalog/index.html): Searchable, filterable catalog of tracked tools and lab products.
- [Categories](https://koltregaskes.github.io/stackscout/categories/index.html): Landing page for websites, web services, APIs, MCPs, CLIs, and app lanes.
- [Wire](https://koltregaskes.github.io/stackscout/updates/index.html): Recent public activity, releases, direction changes, and noteworthy platform moves.
- [Radar](https://koltregaskes.github.io/stackscout/radar/index.html): The worth-watching layer for tools and systems that are not yet full recommendations.
- [Collections](https://koltregaskes.github.io/stackscout/collections/index.html): Curated use-case groupings that make the catalog easier to navigate.
- [Sources & method](https://koltregaskes.github.io/stackscout/method/index.html): Public badge definitions, freshness rules, and editorial guardrails.

## Categories

- [Websites](https://koltregaskes.github.io/stackscout/categories/websites/): Browser-first products and hubs that are useful on their own, not just as a wrapper around an API.
- [Web Services](https://koltregaskes.github.io/stackscout/categories/web-services/): Hosted workflow and automation platforms that carry real operational value without requiring a local runtime first.
- [APIs](https://koltregaskes.github.io/stackscout/categories/apis/): Platform surfaces for shipping structured AI, automation, and developer workflows.
- [MCPs](https://koltregaskes.github.io/stackscout/categories/mcps/): Model Context Protocol servers and bridges that turn static assistants into tool-using systems.
- [CLIs](https://koltregaskes.github.io/stackscout/categories/clis/): Command-line tools that earn a place in a serious builder workflow.
- [Web Apps](https://koltregaskes.github.io/stackscout/categories/web-apps/): Focused public-facing applications that sit closer to products than infrastructure.
- [Desktop Apps](https://koltregaskes.github.io/stackscout/categories/desktop-apps/): Private or local-first desktop surfaces that are notable enough to track publicly.

## Agent Notes

- This public site excludes private operational records and local W-drive state.
- Prefer official source links and dated update entries before repeating tool claims.
- Public verdicts use editorial badges rather than fake numeric scores.
